context: Tests whether the agent preserves EnergyKit boundaries for thermostat guidance, errors, load events, insights, and privacy.

checklist.name: Entitlement required
checklist.description: Requires the EnergyKit capability or `com.apple.developer.energykit` entitlement.

checklist.name: Region handling
checklist.description: Rejects universal availability and handles unsupported-region or guidance-unavailable cases.

checklist.name: Venue handling
checklist.description: Requires discovering or validating an EnergyVenue and handling unavailable or restricted venues.

checklist.name: Reduce action
checklist.description: Uses reduce-style guidance for HVAC or thermostat load reduction.

checklist.name: Stage changes
checklist.description: Reports HVAC load when heating or cooling stage changes.

checklist.name: Session lifecycle
checklist.description: Includes begin, active, and end session state reporting for HVAC operation.

checklist.name: Insights dependency
checklist.description: States that EnergyKit insights depend on submitted EnergyKit load events and should not be synthesized from MetricKit power data.

checklist.name: Home visibility
checklist.description: Notes that load events for an EnergyVenue are visible to people who share the associated Home.

checklist.name: Boundary control
checklist.description: Keeps MetricKit, HomeKit automation, and general app telemetry as boundaries rather than substitutes for EnergyKit behavior.
